title: Build apps that still work on 500 ms latency
meta_description: Cut TTI 70% by moving to ECDSA TLS and Redis 7.2 edge cache — the exact changes teams made when Starlink beams lit up East Africa in 2026.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams are still shipping RSA leaf certs in 2026.

On a Starlink beam in Tororo that burns 480 ms on TLS handshake.

Switch to ECDSA and drop TTI 70%.

https://kubaik.github.io/build-apps-that-still-work-on-500-ms-latency

#AI #ReactJS #CloudComputing #Redis

Done this differently? Tell me what worked.
